titleStmt.title: Letter from Robert Browne to John F. Hogan, 25 May 1916
Letters 1916-1923
titleStmt.author: Robert Browne

editionStmt.p: This work was originally published by Maynooth University in Ireland in 2017. In 2026 this data, stored in a relational database was extracted and converted into this TEI/XML document.

availability.p: This is an open access work licensed under Creative Commons Attribution NonCommercial 4.0 International license (CC BY-NC 4.0).

note.p: This is a letter from Robert Brown (1844–1935), bishop of Cloyne and a former president of St Patrick's College, Maynooth. The letter is addressed to John Francis Hogan (1858–1918), priest, author, and president of St Patrick's College. In the letter Brown authorizes Hogan to present the Cloyne students from St Patrick's College, Maynooth for ordination.

correspAction.placeName: Bishop's House, Queenstown (Cobh), County Cork, Ireland
Maynooth College, Maynooth, County Kildare, Ireland

projectDesc.p: The data in these XML files was generated based on a data dump from the Magellan database (https://github.com/Maynooth-Center-for-Digital-Humanities/Magellan). Each database record has been converted to a JSON file (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/json). The element section of the JSON file contains the TEI-encoded contents of the letters. The TEI XML has been cleaned and made well-formed using a Python script (https://github.com/letters1916static/letters-data/tree/main/src).

body.ab:
21/7/10a Bishop's House,
Queenstown
25 May 1916 My dear President, I hereby authorize and depute you to
present the Cloyne students in
Maynooth College for ordination
at the Conway College ordination
to such Orders as you and your Council
may call them to. I also dispense, so far as may
be necessary in individual cases
in the Interstices. Thanks for allowing me to have
the comfortable Bewer.. wom
Yours faithfully
+ Robert Browne
Bishop of Cloyne To:
Right Rev Mgr Hogan,
President,
Maynooth College
